steps.title: Apply the simplification from the given condition
steps.content:
The given equation is $\left(10\right)(6-4x)+5 = 9(6-4x)+23$.

Subtract $\left(9\right)(6-4x)$ from both sides:
$$(6-4x) + 5 = 23$$

Subtract 5 from both sides:
$$6 - 4x = 18$$

steps.title: Compute the target value
steps.content: So $6-4x = 18$. That matches the correct answer -- D is correct.
